items.name: Prismatic Dominus
items.description:
Forged from pure spectrum energy and hidden within the shadows of the void, the **Prismatic Dominus** radiates every color imaginable while keeping its mysterious black core. Light bends across its surface, creating a living rainbow that shifts like a cosmic storm.

This legendary piece is more than just a dominus — it is a symbol of rarity, creativity, and power.

Only those who truly stand out deserve to wear it.

Created and released by **UltraBit**, this limited item represents the group's vision: bold designs, vibrant energy, and unforgettable style. Owning the Prismatic Dominus means you’re part of something rare.

**Limited. Powerful. Unforgettable.**
